title: The Heart of the Yukon
writer: Everett C. Maxwell, W.S. Van Dyke
actors: John Bowers, Anne Cornwall, Edward Hearn, Frank Campeau
plot: A girl, Anita Wayne, finds herself an heiress of her mother's estate, but learns that her father lives in Alaska. Determined to find her father she travels to a mining town in the Klondike,...
